treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Tylenol, IV dilaudid, Lidocaine patch prior to transfer to the floor
treatment_information.treatment_response: Ongoing pain of R low back radiating down RLE

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 5 mg PO Q6H PRN pain - moderate
Apply one patch to affected area QPM

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with acute exacerbation of low back pain
Patient evaluated in clinic and underwent lumbar spine MRI
Patient treated in ED with Tylenol, IV dilaudid, and Lidocaine patch
Prescribed Gabapentin, Oxycodone, and Lidocaine patch for discharge

patient_outcome.final_status: Ambulatory - requires assistance or aid (walker or cane)
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with primary care doctor and pain doctor as scheduled.
